overall.description: Ship simulator gameplay depicting nighttime navigation from the vessel's bridge. The view shows the ship's bow cutting through dark waters with navigation displays overhead, while the vessel performs maneuvering turns as a distant contact appears on the horizon.

events.description: ship initiates port turn as indicated by radar heading marker moving left
ship executes starboard turn returning to center heading

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation controls and monitoring the radar display while maneuvering through the harbor

entered.detail: navigation monitor showing electronic chart with depth contours and channel markers
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding waters
depth sounder display showing water column and bottom profile
forward deck of the vessel with navigation lights and railings visible through the bridge window
metal safety railing along the bow of the ship
calm dark water surrounding the vessel illuminated by deck lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the ship's bridge with three navigation displays visible overhead. The vessel is maneuvering through dark waters at night, executing a series of port and starboard turns as shown on the center radar display. The bow of the ship is visible through the forward windows with red navigation lights illuminated.

events.description: vessel executes sharp starboard turn followed by return to port
small radar contact appears on the horizon directly ahead of the vessel

agents.ego_description: continuing navigation while monitoring the new contact on radar and adjusting heading accordingly

notable_agents.action: distant vessel or navigation marker visible on the horizon, stationary or moving slowly

entered.detail: small white radar contact visible on the horizon, possibly another vessel or buoy

segments.scene_description: The ship continues maneuvering with the radar display showing alternating starboard and port turns. A distant contact appears on the horizon around the 13-second mark, visible as a small white dot dead ahead. The navigation displays remain active with the center radar continuously sweeping.

events.description: ship executes sustained port turn with radar heading marker moving hard left
vessel completes turn and returns to steady forward heading

agents.ego_description: completing the navigation maneuver and steadying the ship on course while the distant contact fades from view

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ship completing its maneuvering sequence with a sustained port turn before steadying on course. The distant vessel contact fades from visibility as the navigation continues through the dark harbor waters. The bridge displays remain illuminated showing stable navigation data.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel executes a series of maneuvers through dark nighttime waters. It begins with the bow visible through the forward windows under red navigation lights, while three overhead displays track the ship's alternating port and starboard turns. As the vessel continues its zig-zagging path, a small white dot emerges on the horizon as a distant contact appears dead ahead. The scene then shifts as the ship completes a final sustained port turn to steady its course, causing the distant contact to gradually fade from visibility. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the dark harbor waters as the bridge displays settle into stable navigation data.
